stemHtml: Which statement describes an occasion for carrying out a compass swing on a direct reading compass?

options.a: After an aircraft has passed through a severe electrical storm or has been struck by lightning.
options.b: Before an aircraft goes on any flight that involves a large change of magnetic latitude.
options.c: After any of the aircraft radio equipment has been changed due to unserviceability.
options.d: Whenever an aircraft carries a large freight load regardless of its content.
